scenarios.title: Transfer valid amount between two existing users
sourceRefs: senderId and receiverId: required, both users must exist
amount: number > 0, up to two decimal places
Success response code: 200
scenarios.setupReason: Users must exist and sender must have sufficient balance before transfer

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_sender} and name $${random_str_sender}
Create a receiver user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
Deposit 100.00 EUR into sender $${sender_id} wallet
Transfer 100.00 EUR from sender $${sender_id} to receiver $${receiver_id}

scenarios.title: Transfer with amount of two decimal places
sourceRefs: amount: number > 0, up to two decimal places
Success response code: 200
scenarios.setupReason: Users must exist and sender must have sufficient balance

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
Deposit 10.55 EUR to sender $${sender_id} wallet
Transfer 10.55 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id}

scenarios.title: Transfer entire balance leaving sender at zero
sourceRefs: After the transfer, the sender's balance must not become negative
The balance cannot be negative
scenarios.setupReason: Users must exist and sender must have a known exact balance to transfer fully

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
Deposit 100.00 EUR into wallet for sender $${sender_id}
Transfer 100.00 EUR from sender $${sender_id} to receiver $${receiver_id} to leave zero balance

scenarios.title: Transfer exactly 5,000 EUR in a single day (daily amount limit boundary)
sourceRefs: total outgoing amount per calendar day ≤ 5,000 EUR
Success response code: 200
scenarios.setupReason: Users must exist and sender must have at least 5000 EUR deposited

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
Deposit 5000 EUR into sender $${sender_id} wallet
Transfer 5000 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id}

scenarios.title: 5th transfer in a single day succeeds (count limit boundary)
sourceRefs: no more than 5 outgoing transfers per calendar day
Success response code: 200
scenarios.setupReason: Sender must have made exactly 4 prior transfers today to test the boundary

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
Deposit 100.00 EUR into sender_id wallet
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id}
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (5th transfer of the day)
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (4th transfer of the day)
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (5th transfer of the day)
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (5th transfer of the day)

scenarios.title: Transfer with non-existent senderId
sourceRefs: senderId and receiverId: required, both users must exist
404: sender or receiver not found

executionDraft.stepSummary: Transfer EUR $${random_decimal_amount} from non-existent senderId 'non-existent-user-id' to receiverId $${random_str_receiver}

scenarios.title: Transfer with non-existent receiverId
sourceRefs: senderId and receiverId: required, both users must exist
404: sender or receiver not found
scenarios.setupReason: Sender must exist to isolate the missing receiver scenario

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_sender} and name $${random_str_sender}
Transfer EUR 100.00 from $${sender_id} to a non-existent receiverId 'non_existent_user_123'

scenarios.title: Self-transfer where senderId equals receiverId
sourceRefs: senderId ≠ receiverId (self-transfers are not allowed)
400: invalid data (senderId = receiverId, amount ≤ 0, unsupported currency)
scenarios.setupReason: User must exist to attempt a self-transfer

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Transfer EUR 100.00 from user $${user_id} to the same user $${user_id}

scenarios.title: Transfer with amount of zero
sourceRefs: amount: number > 0, up to two decimal places
400: invalid data (senderId = receiverId, amount ≤ 0, unsupported currency)

executionDraft.stepSummary: Transfer 0 EUR between users

scenarios.title: Transfer with negative amount
sourceRefs: amount: number > 0, up to two decimal places
400: invalid data (senderId = receiverId, amount ≤ 0, unsupported currency)

executionDraft.stepSummary: Transfer -10.00 EUR from $${random_str_senderId} to $${random_str_receiverId}

scenarios.title: Transfer amount exceeding sender's balance
sourceRefs: After the transfer, the sender's balance must not become negative
402: insufficient funds on the sender's account
scenarios.setupReason: Users must exist and sender must have a known balance lower than the transfer amount

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Deposit 100.00 EUR into sender $${sender_id} wallet
Transfer 150.00 EUR from sender $${sender_id} to receiver $${receiver_id} exceeding the 100.00 EUR balance

scenarios.title: Transfer when sender has zero balance
sourceRefs: After the transfer, the sender's balance must not become negative
402: insufficient funds on the sender's account
scenarios.setupReason: Users must exist; sender has no deposit so balance is zero

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
Transfer 10.00 EUR from sender $${sender_id} to receiver $${receiver_id}

scenarios.title: 6th transfer in a single day exceeds count limit
sourceRefs: no more than 5 outgoing transfers per calendar day
403: daily limit on number of operations exceeded
scenarios.setupReason: Sender must have already made 5 transfers today to trigger the count limit

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
Deposit 10.00 EUR to sender $${sender_id} wallet
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id}
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (Setup transfer 4 of 5)
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (Setup transfer 5 of 5)
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (Setup transfer 6 of 5)
Transfer 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} (Setup transfer 5 of 5)
Attempt the 6th transfer of 10.00 EUR from $${sender_id} to $${receiver_id} to exceed the daily limit

scenarios.title: Transfer that pushes daily outgoing total above 5,000 EUR
sourceRefs: total outgoing amount per calendar day ≤ 5,000 EUR
429: daily amount limit exceeded
scenarios.setupReason: Sender must have already sent 5000 EUR today so the next transfer exceeds the limit

executionDraft.stepSummary: Create a new user with email $${random_email_user} and name $${random_str_user}
Create a new user with email $${random_email_receiver} and name $${random_str_receiver}
